## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened, including error messages or unexpected output.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Node version**: [e.g. 18.20.0, 22.0.0]
- **CodeContext version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Install method**: [e.g. npm global, source clone]
- **AI coding agent**: [e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, none (CLI only)]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here — logs, receipts, reproduction files.
